channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI skills that boost 2026 paychecks
item.description: AI skills that move the needle on 2026 salaries — prompt engineering vs. LLM observability with concrete payoff data and actionable steps to test your own systems today.

item.title: Get paid what you're worth remotely
item.description: Negotiate remote salary: tools to calculate your cost-of-living baseline and comparison tables that shut down discount arguments — proven results from 3 deals in 2026.

item.title: Pool size isn't a fixed number
item.description: Learn why setting database pool size to 10 or 20 breaks in 2026. Use real data, benchmarks, and cost figures to set pool size correctly for Kubernetes, serverless, and monoliths.

item.title: Shrink cloud carbon without slowing code
item.description: Cut AWS bill 47% and cloud carbon 35% by swapping ALB for NLB, adding Redis 7.2 cache, and compressing PostgreSQL WAL. Real numbers from a 200k-user Latin American fintech stack.

item.title: RAG pipelines: why PostgreSQL breaks
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 58% while raising recall 13% — the retrieval tier that breaks first, FAISS vs pgvector benchmarks, and the one config that saved $820/day for 80k users in 2026.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech? Hidden costs matter
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech for reasons beyond salary — 2026 data on latency spikes, pool exhaustion, and silent failures that drain velocity.

item.title: Raise remote salary: Turkey to USD in 7 days
item.description: Raise remote salary 42% in 7 days using 2026 PPP math, Notion template, and email scripts that anchor to client benchmarks, not your cost of living.

item.title: Ship real work, not side hacks
item.description: Portfolio projects that land remote jobs from Africa in 2026 use real infra, not clones. Learn why 80% of recruiters skip GitHub stars and what to build instead.

item.title: Your max pool size is probably too small
item.description: Cut connection pool errors 90% by setting max_pool_size to (RPS × query_time) instead of vCPU × 2. Benchmarks from 47 Node 20 LTS services show p99 latency drops from 2100 ms to 88 ms with the right pool size.

item.title: 2026 AI pay gap: Python beats SQL by $66k
item.description: Python vs SQL AI salaries 2026: $66k gap revealed — which stack pays more and why. Real benchmarks, costs, and mistakes that cost real money.

item.title: AI code misses edge cases
item.description: Cut edge-case failures 70% with ESLint vs SonarQube — concurrency, protocol races, and timeout misconfigurations most teams miss. Practical rules and real benchmarks for 2026.

item.title: Senior exodus: what really breaks engineers
item.description: Yet attrition among engineers with 5–10 years of experience remains stubbornly high — around 12% annually at Google and Meta in 2025, according to…

item.title: Async pool size: why your DB chokes
item.description: Cut database latency 60% by fixing pool size — new formula beats the 2002 heuristic. PostgreSQL 16, Aurora, Node 20 LTS, Go 1.21, Python 3.11 asyncio.

item.title: Convert local pay to remote USD like a pro
item.description: Increase remote salary 16% with a data-driven Google Sheet that converts local costs to USD and anchors high. Includes live FX, Levels.fyi 2026 bands, and negotiation scripts.

item.title: Production RAG pipelines: the missing pieces
item.description: Cut RAG latency 73% and AWS costs 61% by splitting the pipeline, pinning models, and adding deduplication — the production tricks most tutorials skip.

item.title: Ship African dev portfolio that hires remotely
item.description: Cut remote job rejections in half by shipping a portfolio that looks like production code — not just clean code. Real examples, cost breakdowns, and the 2-minute demo that got devs hired from Nairobi, Lagos, and Kampala in 2026.

item.title: $81k AI skills in 2026: who really gets paid
item.description: 2026 salary gap revealed: Prompt Reliability Engineers earn $30k+ more than ML engineers. Data-backed breakdown of skills, tools, and ROI.

item.title: Time-savers that bite solo devs
item.description: A 2025 Stack Overflow survey found 68% of solo devs underestimate how much time they spend on infrastructure plumbing — and 42% of those outages were…

item.title: WebSockets vs SSE vs Polling: Which to Use
item.description: Choose WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling in 2026 with real latency numbers, Safari bugs, and a 30-minute decision checklist.

item.title: Big tech attrition: the invisible toll
item.description: Cut on-call pages 91% with Redis TTL and circuit breakers — how senior engineers quietly burn out and what concrete metrics to track in 2026.
